description: This pipeline processes image data by first converting regions of interest into label images, then removing labels that touch the edges of the image. The resulting labels are converted back into regions of interest and their statistics are calculated. These statistics are then combined into a single table, which can be exported as a file. Additionally, the pipeline generates tables containing properties of specific objects, such as macrophages and spores, excluding those that touch the edges of the image, and exports these tables as files. The pipeline also allows for the export of combined results in a single table. Overall, the pipeline appears to be designed for analyzing and processing microscopic image data, specifically for identifying and characterizing certain types of cells or objects within the images.

48e06639-9499-47a5-8308-6f376c50fe6b.name: table-merge-tables
48e06639-9499-47a5-8308-6f376c50fe6b.description:
Merges multiple tables into one table by merging the list of rows. Columns are automatically created if they do not exist.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

c622a709-ed7b-4c5f-8f2a-8019e906dc4e.name: ij1-roi-to-labels-expression
c622a709-ed7b-4c5f-8f2a-8019e906dc4e.description:
Converts ROI and an optional reference image into a label image. Each ROI is assigned its own label. Alternatively, the label can be set generated from an expression. If no reference image is provided, the dimensions are estimated from the ROI. The background color (where no ROI is located) is zero.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

527013d5-dd79-4e45-b431-d9753ff3ec5f.name: ij1-roi-statistics
527013d5-dd79-4e45-b431-d9753ff3ec5f.description:
Generates a results table containing ROI statistics. If a reference image is provided, the statistics are calculated for the reference image. Otherwise, an empty reference image is automatically generated.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

643d3826-9c01-489a-9f5d-df31ed94007f.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExcludeLabelsOnEdges
643d3826-9c01-489a-9f5d-df31ed94007f.description:
Removes all labels from a label map which touch the edges of the image (in X, Y and Z if the image is 3D).

Remaining label elements are renumbered afterwards.

Parameters: Image label_map_input, ByRef Image label_map_destination
Available for: 2D, 3D



Please be aware that this node was generated automatically by JIPipe from existing interfaces provided by CLIJ. Please contact the JIPipe developers if you find any issues.

ecc56997-099c-4db7-b73b-ff814407f0de.name: iji-export-table-v2
ecc56997-099c-4db7-b73b-ff814407f0de.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

622cb5f2-a9ef-48f5-9db2-96880aef79b9.name: ij1-roi-to-labels-expression
622cb5f2-a9ef-48f5-9db2-96880aef79b9.description:
Converts ROI and an optional reference image into a label image. Each ROI is assigned its own label. Alternatively, the label can be set generated from an expression. If no reference image is provided, the dimensions are estimated from the ROI. The background color (where no ROI is located) is zero.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

cbd810f2-412a-4db2-8437-e28f3c8e7b82.name: ij1-labels-to-roi
cbd810f2-412a-4db2-8437-e28f3c8e7b82.description: Converts a label image into a set of ROI. Labels must have a value larger than zero to be detected.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice. The Z/C/T coordinates of the source slices are saved inside the ROI.

947d8bab-26e7-4238-8d74-1103d9538562.name: iji-export-table-v2
947d8bab-26e7-4238-8d74-1103d9538562.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

328fd211-bb98-4783-866a-c32153daae09.name: table-add-annotation-columns
328fd211-bb98-4783-866a-c32153daae09.description: Adds column annotations to the table as new columns.
